message.content:
In the project at d:/learn, search for how the regulations/法规 feature is rendered in the UI. Look in index.html and renderer.js for:
1. The regulations section/tab HTML
2. The JavaScript code that loads and displays regulations
3. Any add/edit/delete UI for regulations

Return the relevant code sections with line numbers.

content.text: I'll search for the regulations feature in the project at d:/learn. Let me start by exploring the structure and then looking at the HTML and JavaScript files.
Let me search for the main source files and look at index.html and renderer.js:

input.command: find /d/learn -name "renderer.js" -type f | grep -v node_modules | grep -v dist
